creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
lang/ghc fails to build with the default options (notably BOOT=off) if LOCALBASE != /usr/local:


=============================
 .
 .
[1 of 1] Compiling Main             ( Setup.hs, Setup.o )
Linking Setup ...
cc: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-nopie' [-Wunused-command-line-argument]
cc: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-nopie' [-Wunused-command-line-argument]
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -liconv
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
`cc' failed in phase `Linker'. (Exit code: 1)
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/ghc
=============================

It seems the pre-built bootstrap version of ghc has hard-coded references to /usr/local.  Is there a way to override those references?
